sections.paragraph:
f. prop. abomination (see the root No. 4), uncleanness, impurity, Zec 13:1 מֵי־הַנִדָּה Num 19:9, 13 Num 19:13, 20 Num 19:20, 21 Num 19:21, water of impurity, i.e. water by which the unclean were purged, cleansing water. Specially-

(1) filth, menstrual uncleanness of women, Levit. 12:2 15:19 , 20 Jer 15:20hence used of the menstrual discharge, Lev 15:24, 25 Lev 15:25, 33 Lev 15:33.

(2) something unclean, or filthy, i.q. תֹּועֵבָה used of idols, 2Ch 29:5 Ezr 9:11 Lam 1:17 of incest, Lev 20:21.
